bypass_policy_lockout_safety_check.description: Enables bypassing the policy lockout safety check, allowing updates to the file system policy that could prevent access; use with caution.

file_system_id.description: ID of the EFS file system to which the policy will be applied; must be a valid file system ID.

policy.description: Defines the JSON-formatted IAM policy for the EFS file system, specifying access permissions and controls.
